text_orig:
Also today — the IDF released footage confirming the elimination of Iranian regime air defense personnel who were attempting to target Israeli forces using air defense systems.

Israeli Air Force aircraft struck and neutralized the cell. At the same time, the IAF continues ongoing strikes on air defense systems — including launchers, missiles, and radar systems — intended to harm Israeli aircraft.

The IDF states it will not allow Iran’s terror regime to operate air defense systems against Israeli forces and will continue striking efforts to arm missile launchers.

Simultaneously, the Air Force is continuing strikes on Iranian fire arrays and ballistic missile launch sites.
text_en:
Also today — the IDF released footage confirming the elimination of Iranian regime air defense personnel who were attempting to target Israeli forces using air defense systems.

Israeli Air Force aircraft struck and neutralized the cell. At the same time, the IAF continues ongoing strikes on air defense systems — including launchers, missiles, and radar systems — intended to harm Israeli aircraft.

The IDF states it will not allow Iran’s terror regime to operate air defense systems against Israeli forces and will continue striking efforts to arm missile launchers.

Simultaneously, the Air Force is continuing strikes on Iranian fire arrays and ballistic missile launch sites.

text_orig:
🔥NEW: The IDF confirms the elimination in Beirut of Reza Khazaei, the Quds Force official responsible for Hezbollah’s force buildup and head of the Lebanon Corps staff.

Khazaei was a key architect of Hezbollah’s rearmament — serving as the link between Iran and the terror group, overseeing weapons transfers, rebuilding efforts, and expanding Iranian-backed military capabilities inside Lebanon.

He played a central role in restoring Hezbollah’s arsenal after previous fighting, facilitating weapons smuggling routes from Iran, and advancing local weapons production on Lebanese soil.

The IDF says it will continue acting forcefully against Hezbollah and against its decision to fight under the sponsorship of the Iranian terror regime.
text_en:
🔥NEW: The IDF confirms the elimination in Beirut of Reza Khazaei, the Quds Force official responsible for Hezbollah’s force buildup and head of the Lebanon Corps staff.

Khazaei was a key architect of Hezbollah’s rearmament — serving as the link between Iran and the terror group, overseeing weapons transfers, rebuilding efforts, and expanding Iranian-backed military capabilities inside Lebanon.

He played a central role in restoring Hezbollah’s arsenal after previous fighting, facilitating weapons smuggling routes from Iran, and advancing local weapons production on Lebanese soil.

The IDF says it will continue acting forcefully against Hezbollah and against its decision to fight under the sponsorship of the Iranian terror regime.

text_orig:
🔥The IDF says that alongside ongoing strikes, Israeli forces are operating in southern Lebanon and holding multiple forward positions near the border as part of an expanded defensive posture.

The goal: create an added security buffer for northern Israeli communities, dismantle Hezbollah terror infrastructure, and prevent infiltration attempts.

The IDF says Hezbollah chose to attack on behalf of the Iranian regime — and will bear the consequences. Israel will continue acting to protect its civilians.
text_en:
🔥The IDF says that alongside ongoing strikes, Israeli forces are operating in southern Lebanon and holding multiple forward positions near the border as part of an expanded defensive posture.

The goal: create an added security buffer for northern Israeli communities, dismantle Hezbollah terror infrastructure, and prevent infiltration attempts.

The IDF says Hezbollah chose to attack on behalf of the Iranian regime — and will bear the consequences. Israel will continue acting to protect its civilians.

text_orig:
🚨 BREAKING: Defense Minister Israel Katz says he and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu have authorized the IDF to advance and seize additional strategic high ground inside Lebanon to prevent further fire on Israeli border communities.

Katz says the move is intended to block the possibility of direct fire on Israeli towns, as the IDF continues intensive strikes against Hezbollah targets.

“Hezbollah is paying — and will continue to pay — for firing on Israel,” Katz says, pledging security for Galilee communities.
text_en:
🚨 BREAKING: Defense Minister Israel Katz says he and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu have authorized the IDF to advance and seize additional strategic high ground inside Lebanon to prevent further fire on Israeli border communities.

Katz says the move is intended to block the possibility of direct fire on Israeli towns, as the IDF continues intensive strikes against Hezbollah targets.

“Hezbollah is paying — and will continue to pay — for firing on Israel,” Katz says, pledging security for Galilee communities.
